text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Look, look! Something amazing happened this
morning! I woke up and...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...I now have a lion's mane! Rawr!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee... Whenever I oversleep, my bed head
looks like this.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
King said she'd fix it for me, but I wanted to show
you first since it's so funny-looking!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well... it seems like Haru Urara is well-rested
today!
